description: MCP server for executing shell commands on remote hosts via SSH.
name: io.github.jordanburke/ssh-client-mcp-server

packageArguments.description: SSH server hostname or IP address
packageArguments.name: --host

packageArguments.description: SSH username (defaults to current OS user if omitted)
packageArguments.name: --user

packageArguments.description: Path to private SSH key file (use either --password or --key); supports ~ and $VAR expansion
packageArguments.name: --key

packageArguments.description: Name of an environment variable containing the private SSH key PEM (e.g. injected by envpkt, Vault, Doppler)
packageArguments.name: --key-env

packageArguments.description: Set to 'true' to authenticate via SSH_AUTH_SOCK (works with system ssh-agent, 1Password, Bitwarden Desktop, KeePassXC)
packageArguments.name: --agent

packageArguments.description: Default tmux session name for the tmux_* tools (default: agent)
packageArguments.name: --tmux-session
